project_metadata.description: A cutting-edge digital agency one-page website for VELORA, leveraging glassmorphism, animated gradients, and floating interactive cards. Includes sticky glass navigation, featured services, premium animated hero, interactive portfolio, process timeline, glowing testimonials, dynamic FAQ accordion, negotiable pricing, and a universal WhatsApp button for conversions. Fully responsive, all-animated, and world-class production quality. No backend needed: all contact methods are via WhatsApp/email/phone links.
project_metadata.core_purpose: To establish VELORA as a world-class modern digital agency, providing a visually authoritative, interactive, and highly converting web presence, displaying expertise and case studies with premium design and all critical agency conversion tools.
project_metadata.target_audience: Small-Medium Businesses, Startups, Luxury Brands and Companies seeking premium digital agency services
key_features: Fixed glassmorphic header navigation with animated CTA and floating WhatsApp button
Full-screen animated gradient hero with floating glass cards and animated stats
Glassmorphism services section with 8 animated cards
Portfolio grid with 6 case studies & animated project modals
Pricing with 3 cards – negotiable/flexible, no fixed prices
Contact section: form, WhatsApp/email/phone quick actions
Glass, logo, social icons, and all quick links in footer
Global floating WhatsApp button, always-visible action
All cards/modal/scroll/hover are animated with Framer Motion
Fully mobile responsive, wide desktop layouts, soft glass texture

pages.purpose: Provide an authoritative, visually stunning agency web presence for VELORA, showcase offerings and case studies, maximize conversions (contact/WhatsApp). One-page with floating action and multiple sections.
pages.description: Modern, production-grade premium agency website for VELORA. Glassmorphism, animated gradients, and premium cards feature throughout. All sections as dedicated components for maintainability: HeroAnimatedGradient, ServiceGlassGrid, PortfolioCaseStudies with ProjectCaseStudyModal, ProcessTimeline, PricingPackages, TestimonialReviews, FaqAccordion, ContactSection. Navigation is sticky and glassy with mobile drawer. Global floating WhatsApp button is always accessible. Card, modal, and interactive sections use Framer Motion for entry/hover animations. Soft white/blue/pink/purple color system with luxurious, airy spacings and floating effects. All interaction points—buttons, accordions, modals, carousels—are smooth, premium, and mobile-first. Footer includes all required quick links and contact/socials. No backend: contact is via mailto/tel/WhatsApp links only; no server persistence. Optimized for conversion, visual credibility, and mobile experience.
pages.content_notes: Single-page layout with all sections componentized: Header (sticky, glass, floating WhatsApp), HeroAnimatedGradient (full-screen, animated background/cards), ServiceGlassGrid (8 glassmorphic animated cards, Services anchor), PortfolioCaseStudies (6 industry case studies with ProjectCaseStudyModal, Portfolio anchor), ProcessTimeline, PricingPackages (no prices, negotiable), TestimonialReviews (carousel glowing cards), FaqAccordion, ContactSection (form and quick links), Footer (glass, social icons). Global FloatingWhatsappButton (overlays all sections except when ContactSection form is focused/active). No backend means contact form uses only client-side validation, and submitted data is not stored or sent anywhere. Smooth scroll-to-section. Extremely mobile-friendly, all sections adapted for various screen sizes.

navigation.style: Glassmorphic sticky shadowed bar with mobile hamburger, floating WhatsApp, premium CTA. Responsive.

theme.design_dna: Modern luxury, premium digital aesthetic: Glassmorphism throughout, animated gradients, ultra-smooth transitions, bold sans-serif (Inter/Plus Jakarta Sans/Urbanist), wide layouts, pill-shaped primary CTAs, floating section cards, frosted blurs, light inner shadows. Minimal, airy. Every card/modal has 24px+ radius, blue/purple border highlights, layering (z-50+ modals), drop shadow xl (rgba soft but enveloping). Text sizes: headings 40-56px bold for Hero, 22-32px for section titles, btns semibold, body/label 16-18px, stats counters extra bold (tracking-tight). Imagery: abstract gradients/floating glass, little/no stock photos. Section spacings xl-wide. Elevation and glow on interactive hover.
theme.color_scheme: Light — soft whites, radiant blue gradients, pastel purples and subtle pinks, glassmorphism overlays, thin glowing borders.
theme.font_family: 'Inter', 'Urbanist', 'Plus Jakarta Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Arial, sans-serif
theme.font_type: Modern rounded sans-serif, semi-bold headings, clean body.
theme.shadow_style: Shadow-xl custom: rgba(89,191,255,0.14) 0 12px 32px 0, with glass layer/blur/soft white on inner surfaces.
theme.animation_style: Framer Motion spring/slide-fade/hover scale, gradient shifts, bounce on CTA; all transitions sub-300ms, cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1)
theme.interaction_style: All key actions animate on hover/tap, buttons ripple or glow. Card hover elevates with shadow/gradient. Smooth scroll-to/snap, modals fade/slide, accordions expand with spring motion, carousels auto-scroll and swipe.

components.description: Sticky top navigation bar with glassmorphic background (blur, semi-transparent, soft white), subtle drop shadow (shadow-xl), and softly rounded corners. Contains VELORA logo on left, main nav links ('Home', 'Services', 'Portfolio', 'Process', 'Pricing', 'Reviews', 'FAQ', 'Contact') horizontally aligned center/right (hidden in mobile, revealed in hamburger menu). Includes floating WhatsApp button at top-right (mobile: docked in bottom-right), and Contact and WhatsApp buttons (primary gradient-filled, pill-shaped). Desktop: links spread with md:px-8, py-4. Animated hover underline for links. Responsive for mobile (collapsible menu with slide-in and backdrop).
components.purpose: Site-wide navigation and brand presentation; provides access to main sections and easy contact trigger.

components.description: Full-viewport height hero section. Large bold headline with animated gradient fill (blue-pink-lavender angle shifting with Framer Motion). VELORA tagline below in semi-bold, soft gray. Animated background: subtle looping gradient motion (Framer Motion/Canvas or CSS keyframes). Contains two central call-to-actions: 'See Our Work' and 'Contact Us' (primary gradient, pill shape, smooth hover/press effect). Background floating premium cards (3-4) hover and float around hero center (Glassmorphism: blur, white with 20% opacity, blue/pink glow, floating soft drop shadow, 24px border-radius). Stats strip overlays bottom (agency stats, animated count-up, e.g., '50+ Projects', '20+ Industries', '8 Years Experience'). Perfectly responsive. Large vertical/horizontal spacings (py-28).
components.purpose: Captivates users, presents VELORA’s core promise, showcases agency prestige and offers call to action.

components.description: 8-card responsive grid displaying VELORA services (2/4 desktop, stacked mobile). Each card: animated glassmorphism panel (blur backdrop, border, white 10-15% opacity, blue/purple/pink border highlight on hover, smooth bounce-in/elevate animation). Each card icon: elegant line icon in gradient circle, service title below. Card titles: Website Development, Branding, AI Automation, WhatsApp Automation, Social Media Management, SEO, Paid Ads, UI/UX Design. Hover: card raises/shifts with subtle highlight. Responsive grid gap-8, py-24. Headline and brief tagline at top, centered.
components.purpose: Visually presents VELORA’s main services; interacts smoothly for premium feel.

components.description: Responsive grid (3x2 on desktop, stacked on mobile) of 6 image case-study cards, each for a specific industry (Restaurant, Gym, Luxury Hotel, Fashion Brand, Startup, Cafe). Each card: glassmorphic overlay (blurred white with soft border), sharp, high-contrast thumbnail; hover reveals animated overlay with project summary and 'View Project' button (gradient, pill, opens modal). Smooth fade/scale-in on load. Clicking a card opens ProjectCaseStudyModal (Framer Motion) with scrollable detail: client name, industry, short description, prominent hero image, result highlights, and a set of service tags. Modal is centered, scroll-locked, closes on background click/X. All grid and modal layouts are fluid and mobile-friendly.
components.purpose: Showcases agency expertise with interactive case studies and visual storytelling.

components.description: Floating modal overlay (95vw max, 640px max-width, glassmorphism backdrop, dark blurred overlay). Inside: Project hero image (rounded, 24px radius, max-h-52), title, industry, description, list of result bullets, service tags (rounded, colored badges). Scrollable content, header with close icon (top-right). Dismissable via backdrop/click/ESC. Enters with slide/fade-up animation, exits smoothly. Accessibility (focus-trap, ARIA labels).
components.purpose: Displays detailed info about case study from PortfolioCaseStudies, optimizes for depth narrative and conversion.

components.description: Horizontal (desktop) and vertical (mobile) process timeline. Six steps: Discovery, Strategy, Design, Development, Launch, Growth. Each step: glassy pill card, step number, step icon (gradient), short description. Connecting lines have slight glowing gradient. Steps animate into view (slide/fade left-to-right). Centered section, py-24. Heading above ('Our Process'), sub-heading for trust/certainty. Elevation on hover (lifted card).
components.purpose: Visually communicates VELORA's methodology and premium, transparent approach.

components.description: Three glassmorphic pricing cards (Starter, Growth, Premium) in responsive flex or grid. Each card: glassy panel, colored border (blue/purple/pink highlight), headline, bulleted features, large 'Flexible Pricing' badge (no price shown), CTA button ('Enquire Now'). Each card has rounded gradient floating icon. Animated card entry. On hover: glow/shadow increases. Below cards: fine-print note that all packages are custom and negotiable. Section headline and subheadline above. py-20, grid gap-6.
components.purpose: Presents offerings with a premium style, pushes contact/conversion rather than rigid pricing.

components.description: Carousel (Framer Motion or horizontal scroll) of 4-6 glowing testimonial cards. Each card: user photo (soft shadow), name, company, glowing gradient border, quotation in italic, rating stars. Cards use glass with light purple/blue tint. Smooth auto-scroll or swipe. Section: white background, colored headline ('Client Reviews'), minimal divider for separation. Responsively adapts to one/two cards view on mobile.
components.purpose: Builds trust via real customer stories and ratings, with high-end visual polish.

components.description: 8-item accordion (vertical stack, 1 open at a time) with glassmorphic panel background. Each question: semi-bold label, click expands to show answer (animated height/opacity transition). Bold blue/purple highlight in active state. Icon rotates to indicate open. Large spacing (py-2 between items). Section heading above, light padding (px-8, py-16).
components.purpose: Answers common concerns, reduces friction for prospects via interactive, accessible layout.

components.description: Two-column (stacked mobile) responsive contact area: left—frosted glass panel with contact form (Name, Email, Message), all inputs glass/white with blue/purple focus ring, large pill submit button (gradient), client-side field validation, submitted triggers animated success state (check icon). Right: large glassy info card with WhatsApp (button), email ('velora2049@gmail.com', mailto link), phone ('+919258903072', tel link), each with action icon (blue/purple). Section: white background/purple accent shadow, prominent 'Get in Touch' headline.
components.purpose: Facilitates direct outreach via multiple channels with sleek, premium style.

components.description: Floating circular WhatsApp button in global bottom-right (desktop: 60px margin, mobile: 24px), always visible except when Contact modal/form is open. Glassy effect, green gradient, WhatsApp icon centered, bounce animation on load. Clicking opens WhatsApp chat with VELORA’s number. Accessible for all screen sizes, high contrast.
components.purpose: Provides instant access to WhatsApp inquiry from any page viewport.

components.description: Wide (max-w-7xl) glassmorphic footer, with large VELORA logo left/top, quick navigation links in two columns, social icons row (LinkedIn, Instagram, Twitter, WhatsApp; rounded colored icon buttons with hover effect), contact info left-aligned. Legal note/copyright bottom. Soft border, 16px border-radius, subtle blur, color highlights. Responsive: one-column stack on mobile. px-8, py-16.
components.purpose: Final touchpoint with easy navigation, social, and contact info. Conveys premium brand cohesion.

layout.spacing: Wide (32px sections, 24px horizontal paddings, generous vertical spacing)

frontend.routing: react-router-dom — single route, section anchors (for navigation)
frontend.styling: TailwindCSS v4 (JIT, custom glassmorphism, radiant gradients, custom shadow/plugin)
frontend.animation: Framer Motion (component entry, hover, timeline, carousel, modal)
